meta.title: Privacy Policy | TNP
meta.description: TNP Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TNP (Lô 35 đường số 9, Khu Công Nghiệp Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam) is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.body: When you submit our contact form, we collect your name, email address, phone number (optional), and project details. We use this information solely to respond to your enquiry and provide a quote. We do not collect data automatically through cookies beyond a single functional preference cookie.

use.title: How we use your data
use.body: Your contact details are used to: respond to your project enquiry, prepare and send a quote, and follow up if you have not received a response. We do not use your data for unsolicited marketing. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties except where required by law.

storage.title: Data storage
storage.body: Contact form submissions are processed via Formspree (formspree.io), a third-party form service. Formspree's privacy policy governs data processed through their platform. We retain your enquiry details for as long as necessary to fulfil your request or as required by applicable law.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: This website uses a single functional cookie to remember your privacy banner acceptance. No tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or analytics scripts are used. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking services.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at thuy@tnpgr.vn. We will respond within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, reach TNP at thuy@tnpgr.vn or +84 90 333 37 29. Address: Lô 35 đường số 9, Khu Công Nghiệp Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam.

hero.title: Solid wood flooring and timber furniture.
hero.subtitle: TNP brings together Japanese material standards and Vietnamese craftsmanship. From Hinoki flooring to custom timber furniture — we design, manufacture, deliver, and install. One team. One standard.
hero.imageAlt: TNP Hinoki solid wood flooring installed in a modern living room — warm grain, Japanese-Vietnamese craftsmanship

about.title: Where Japanese timber meets Vietnamese craft
about.narrative: TNP was born from a connection between Japan and Vietnam. Japan has centuries of reverence for timber — particularly Keyaki, the exceptionally hard and beautiful hardwood prized for ancient temple pillars and premium furniture for its rich luster and durability, and Hinoki, the cypress valued for its fragrance, moisture resistance, and fine grain. Vietnam has generations of skilled woodworkers and a manufacturing tradition that turns raw timber into finished surfaces with precision and care. TNP brings both together. We source premium timbers — Keyaki, Hinoki, oak, walnut, ash, and select Southeast Asian hardwoods — and manufacture solid wood flooring and custom furniture in our own factory in Biên Hòa, Vietnam. Every board is kiln-dried, milled, finished, and inspected before it leaves our facility. We don't outsource. We don't cut corners. And we handle everything from first consultation to final installation.

heritage.title: Japanese-Vietnamese heritage
heritage.text: Japanese material standards, Vietnamese manufacturing excellence.

hinoki.title: Keyaki, Hinoki & premium hardwoods
hinoki.text: Japan's most treasured timbers — Keyaki for its hardness and rich luster, Hinoki for its fragrance and durability — plus a full range of solid woods.

factory.title: Factory-direct
factory.text: Our own facility in Biên Hòa — no middlemen, export-ready.

endToEnd.title: End-to-end service
endToEnd.text: Design, manufacturing, delivery, and installation by one team.

about.imageAlt: Close-up of Hinoki cypress grain — TNP's signature timber, sourced from Japan and manufactured in Vietnam

process.title: From raw timber to finished space
process.leadIn: Every TNP project follows three stages. Whether you need solid wood flooring for an apartment in Tokyo or custom furniture for a home in Saigon — the process is the same.

creation.label: Creation
creation.title: We source, design, and build it
creation.text: It starts with your project brief. What do you need — flooring, furniture, or both? What species and finish? For flooring, we assess the area and subfloor requirements. For furniture, we develop design mockups and material samples. Once you approve, our factory in Biên Hòa takes over. Keyaki, Hinoki, oak, walnut — whatever the timber, it's kiln-dried, precision-milled, joined, sanded, and finished in-house. Every piece passes quality inspection before it ships.
creation.imageAlt: TNP factory — Hinoki planks being precision-milled in the Biên Hòa workshop

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.title: We ship it to you — anywhere
delivery.text: When your order is ready, our logistics team packages, palletizes, and ships — domestically across Vietnam or internationally to Japan and beyond. We handle export documentation, containerization, and freight coordination. Your flooring or furniture arrives protected and on schedule, in the same condition it left our factory floor.
delivery.imageAlt: Palletized Hinoki flooring planks export-packaged and ready for international shipment

installation.label: Installation
installation.title: We install it perfectly
installation.text: For domestic clients, our crew handles everything on-site: subfloor preparation and flooring installation, furniture assembly, leveling, and anchoring. Wall-mounted pieces, built-in units, full-room flooring — we do it all. For international and export clients, we provide detailed installation guides, technical specs, and remote support. Before we consider any project done, we confirm you're satisfied.
installation.imageAlt: TNP technician laying Hinoki solid wood flooring — professional installation in a Vietnamese home

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.body: Tell us about your space and we'll get back to you within 48 hours with ideas and a free quote.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting your project.

q1.question: What is Hinoki and why is it special?
q1.answer: Hinoki (檜 / ヒノキ) is Japanese cypress — one of Japan's most treasured building timbers. It's naturally aromatic, resistant to moisture, rot, and insects, and has a beautiful, fine grain. In Japan it's been used for centuries in temples, baths, and fine homes. TNP sources Hinoki and manufactures it into flooring and furniture at our factory in Vietnam, bringing this premium material to both domestic and international clients.

q2.question: How long does a project take?
q2.answer: Flooring orders typically take 3–5 weeks from confirmation to delivery. Custom furniture takes 4–8 weeks depending on complexity. Full-space projects with both flooring and furniture take 8–12 weeks. We confirm your timeline before any work begins.

q3.question: What timber species do you work with?
q3.answer: Our signature materials are Keyaki (Japanese zelkova) and Hinoki (Japanese cypress). Keyaki is prized for its exceptional hardness, rich luster, and durability — used in ancient temple pillars and high-end furniture and tableware. Hinoki is valued for its natural fragrance, moisture resistance, and fine grain. We also work with oak, walnut, ash, teak, and select Vietnamese and Southeast Asian hardwoods. You choose the species during the consultation — we'll provide samples and explain the characteristics of each.

q4.question: Do you ship internationally?
q4.answer: Yes. TNP is export-ready. We serve domestic clients across Vietnam and ship to Japan and international markets. Export orders include containerization, freight coordination, and all necessary documentation. International shipping is quoted based on destination and volume.

q5.question: Is installation included?
q5.answer: For domestic clients in Vietnam — yes. Our crew handles flooring installation (subfloor prep, laying, finishing) and furniture assembly on-site. For international clients, we provide detailed installation guides and remote technical support.

q6.question: What if I need changes after installation?
q6.answer: We offer a post-install adjustment period for domestic projects. If flooring needs a touch-up or a furniture piece needs realignment, we come back and fix it — no extra charge within the adjustment window.

q7.question: Can I visit your factory?
q7.answer: Absolutely. Our facility is in Tam Phước Industrial Zone, Biên Hòa — about an hour from Ho Chi Minh City. Contact us to arrange a visit and see our production process firsthand.
